prompt_order.title: ROLLBACK_BEARING_STAGED_TRANSITION_VALIDATION-0
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if staged validation tries to reinterpret authority movement or transfer posture
lifecycle_manager_semantics FULL review if staged validation tries to reclassify drain freeze suspend or recover legality
stop_conditions: stop if rollback-bearing validation begins claiming lawful runtime cutover proof
stop if Ζ-A0 attempts live authority transfer trust execution revocation execution or publication execution
stop if receipt-pipeline limitations are hidden rather than kept explicit
notes: This is the narrowest and most reversible first-wave family.
Outputs must remain staged validation rollback downgrade and refusal-aware evidence only.

prompt_order.title: DISTRIBUTED_REPLAY_AND_PROOF_ANCHOR_VERIFICATION-0
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if replay verification tries to reinterpret proof-anchor semantics quorum semantics or transfer posture
stop_conditions: stop if Ζ-A1 claims that cross-shard logs or replication policies already prove lawful distributed continuity
stop if Ζ-A1 claims proof-anchor continuity or deterministic replication realization
stop if verification work drifts into live authority movement or state transfer
notes: This family must stay verification-only and blocker-reduction-oriented.
Outputs must not be treated as gate passage or realization evidence.

prompt_order.title: BOUNDED_RUNTIME_CUTOVER_PROOF_REHEARSAL-0
dependencies: completed Ζ-A1 replay and proof-anchor verification outputs
human_review_requirements: lifecycle_manager_semantics FULL review when cutover rehearsal touches drain freeze suspend recover or swap legality
distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if cutover rehearsal implies authority handoff or state transfer
stop_conditions: stop if Ζ-A2 implies live runtime swap legality or real authority handoff
stop if Ζ-A2 infers admissibility from runtime protocol or shard substrate alone
stop if cutover rehearsal tries to absorb trust-execution or receipt-pipeline realization work
notes: This family remains rehearsal-only and proof-only.
It should follow replay and proof-anchor verification rather than outrunning it.

prompt_order.title: POST_BOUNDED_ZETA_A_FIRST_WAVE_REASSESSMENT-0
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify the first-wave perimeter was not widened by convenience
checkpoint must verify no live authority transfer trust execution publication execution or receipt-pipeline realization work was performed
stop_conditions: stop before any review-gated later-wave or broader Ζ move until this checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint decides whether any later-wave family can even be reconsidered.

stability.replacement_target: later post-Ζ-A next-order artifact may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
